hooks.command: jq -r '.prompt' | grep -qiE '—Б–Ї—А–Є–љ—И–Њ—В|screenshot|—Б–і–µ–ї–∞–є —Б–Ї—А–Є–љ|–њ–Њ–Ї–∞–ґ–Є –Ї–∞–Ї –≤—Л–≥–ї—П–і–Є—В|—Б—Д–Њ—В–Ї–∞–є|—Б—Д–Њ—В–Њ–≥—А–∞—Д–Є—А—Г–є|—Б–љ–Є–Љ–Њ–Ї —Н–Ї—А–∞–љ–∞' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"The user wants a screenshot. Use the /screenshot slash command via the Skill tool with the user message as args. Example: Skill({ skill: \"screenshot\", args: \"<user request>\" })"}}' || echo '{}'
